g.text: FABIO taxes less subsidies per item for United States (USA) — a FABIO-internal decomposition; the World Bank
reference is TOTAL-only, so no WB line is drawn. Blue line/triangles on the Primary (ISIC-A) row(s) =
external A01+A03 taxes less subsidies benchmark (OECD_SUT; exported by scripts 02/03), a primary-agriculture,
forestry-free reference for the covered years. Items grouped as "Other" exactly as in the TOTAL figure (below
3% max |share| of WB across years). Rows: primary (ISIC-A) vs processing (ISIC-C).
FABIO taxes less subsidies [EXIOBASE] — United States (USA) (value-added sub-account)
Taxes less subsidies on production (current US$)
Taxes less subsidies on production (current US$)
